title: Poly(beta-thioester) polymers and polymeric nanoparticles
abstract: The disclosure describes poly(Î²-thioester) polymers and polymeric nanoparticles, pharmaceutical compositions comprising these materials, their use in the treatment of cancer and infectious disease, and machine learning methods for identifying and selecting them.
